🎯 BallisticsToolkit

Professional Ballistics Tools

BallisticsToolkit is a comprehensive suite of precision shooting tools that brings professional-grade ballistic calculations to your browser. Built with modern web technologies and WebAssembly, it provides accurate trajectory calculations and realistic target simulation without requiring any software installation.

Available Tools

📊 Ballistic Calculator

3DOF trajectory calculator with G1/G7 drag models, atmospheric compensation, and wind effects.

Open Calculator

🎯 Target Simulator

Monte Carlo match simulation with NRA targets, statistical analysis, and realistic variability modeling.

Open Simulator
